title: Terebraria lineolata
taxonomy: Terebraria lineolata is classified as a species of salt marsh snail, a type of small terrestrial gastropod mollusk. It belongs to the family Vermetidae. The family Vermetidae is a group of marine and brackish gastropod mollusks, but some species like Terebraria lineolata have adapted to live in salt marsh environments. The class to which Terebraria lineolata belongs is Gastropoda. This classification places Terebraria lineolata within the phylum Mollusca.
